title: Private Yacht Charter Birthday in Marbella: Costs & 2026 Guide
html:
Celebrate a private yacht charter birthday in Marbella from Puerto Banús, with crewed boats starting at €2,000 for a half-day. BoatHire24 connects you with verified listings for an unforgettable day on the Mediterranean.

How much does it cost to rent a private yacht for a birthday in Marbella?

Prices range from €600 for a shared boat trip to over €5,000 for a premium crewed yacht. The final cost depends on the boat size, duration, and added services like catering or water toys. For a private birthday, most groups charter a motor yacht or catamaran for 4 to 8 hours.

Where to set off in Marbella

Puerto Banús is the main departure point for private charters, with its glamorous marina full of superyachts. Other real options include Marbella’s Club del Mar and the smaller Cabopino Marina. From here, you can cruise to the beaches of San Pedro Alcántara, anchor near the dunes of Artola, or head east towards the exclusive area of La Zagaleta. The nearby island of Isla de las Palomas (Tarifa) is a longer trip, but the Bay of Málaga is a popular day destination.

Which boat to rent for a birthday party?

  1. Motor yacht, ideal for a stylish party, up to 12 guests, from €2,500 for a half-day. Consider this motor yacht the Mefasa 90 for ample deck space and en-suite cabins.
  2. Catamaran, stable and spacious, perfect for groups of 10, 18, from €3,000 for a full day. Look for Lagoon models in local fleets.
  3. Sailboat, a more relaxed vibe for up to 8 guests, from €1,200 for a half-day. Many are based at Puerto Banús.
  4. RIB or speedboat, for a fast, water-sports-focused birthday, up to 6 guests, from €600 for a half-day. Axopar boats are popular for this.

Private yacht charter in Marbella gives you freedom to design your itinerary. You can stop for a swim at the Cabo de Plata cove or enjoy lunch anchored off the coast of Estepona. The Mefasa 90, a 27-metre motor yacht, sleeps 12 and includes a flybridge with a Jacuzzi.

Costs of a private birthday charter in Marbella

Expect prices in EUR for the 2026 season. To secure the best yacht for your date, browse boats for your dates on BoatHire24. Below are typical price bands:

  • Shared boat tour: from €80 per person for a 4-hour trip (20+ guests).
  • Small motorboat (half-day, up to 6 guests): from €600.
  • Catamaran full-day (up to 18 guests): from €3,500.
  • Crewed luxury yacht (full-day, up to 12 guests): from €5,000, often including fuel, crew, and a light meal.

When is the best season for a birthday yacht charter?

The high season runs from June to September, when the Poniente wind often brings calm seas. July and August are the hottest months, with average sea temperatures of 24°C. Charter prices are highest in August, up to 30% above shoulder season. For a local tip:

Early evening charters from Puerto Banús offer stunning sunset views; many boats dock for tapas at the port’s restaurants. The real highlight is swimming in the Marbella Bay under the golden hour light.
No licence is required to charter a crewed boat in Spain; the operator confirms exact requirements for bareboat hire.

At a glance

  • Price band: €600, €5,000+
  • Peak months: June, September
  • Typical trip length: 4, 8 hours
  • Guest capacity: 6, 18 (private)
  • Currency: Euro (EUR)

Questions about boat rental in Marbella

Can I bring my own food and drink on a private charter?

Yes, most operators allow you to bring your own catering, though many offer packages with Spanish cuisine and sparkling wine.

What happens if the weather is bad on my charter day?

The captain decides; if cancelled due to safety, you typically receive a full refund or a rescheduled date at no extra cost.

Is it possible to stay overnight on a private yacht in Marbella?

Yes, many motor yachts and catamarans have cabins and overnight permits; you can sleep aboard near Puerto Banús or at anchor.

How far in advance should I book for a birthday in Marbella?

Book at least two weeks ahead in high season to secure the best boat; last-minute options exist but with limited choice.

To book your perfect birthday yacht, browse the listings on BoatHire24. Boat owners can also create a profile and earn by listing their vessels. BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Marbella or list your own.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Marbella and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
